Home Projects About Contact

Overview

This series captures the electric atmosphere of Tokyo’s nightlife, focusing on the interplay of neon lights, rain-slicked streets, and the solitary figures navigating the urban landscape.

Technical Details

  • Camera: Sony A7III
  • Lenses: 35mm f/1.4, 85mm f/1.8
  • Processing: Lightroom Classic, Photoshop

Gallery

Reflections

Photography allows me to freeze moments that would otherwise disappear into memory. This trip taught me patience and the art of waiting for the perfect light.
